allow: Bash(for skill in /home/mshahzebraza/CC/obsidian-vaults/primary-vault/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md; do echo "=== $\(basename $\(dirname $skill\)\) ===" && head -20 "$skill" && echo ""; done)

hooks.command: [ -f "graphify-rs-out/graph.json" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify-rs: vault knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-rs-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md or query graphify-rs-out/graph.json before grepping raw notes."}}' || true
